profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Coming from a background in metrology and currently transitioning into software development, I am looking for a 4-month fixed-term contract (beginning of May – end of August 2026) in metrology before starting my new career in September 2026.

items: Development of new calibration methods for thermometers
Finalize SQM procedures related to the internship
Calibrate and verify measuring instruments in the dimensional and temperature fields
Calibrate thermometers over the temperature range from -40°C to 1400°C

Compare calibration methods for temperature probes used to monitor the cryogenic stages of Ariane 5, over the range 20 K to 27 K, with the objective of achieving a maximum calibration uncertainty of 0.05°C (k=3)
Calibrate measuring instruments in-house across various fields (temperature, dimensional, pressure, mass, etc.)
Assess subcontractor capabilities, negotiate deadlines, and place orders for external calibration of measuring instruments
Develop calibration methods in compliance with applicable standards
Develop calibration and measurement uncertainty calculations (following the GUM method from BIPM)
Provide support to user departments in finding technical measurement solutions
Create Power BI Desktop reports and deploy them on the web service
